title: PDF/scan — one-page Durin intake-router architecture memo

syntheticContent: A synthetic one-page architecture memo describing the Durin intake-router: one governed admission spine, immutable originals, derived working copies, privacy lanes, and receipts. Includes an intentionally wrong author attribution so the correction/supersession path (A8) has real material to exercise.

expectedThemes.value: internal synthetic memo, generated for Slice 0

duplicateBehavior: Re-importing the identical PDF bytes must match on contentHash and create a DuplicateObservation linked to the canonical SourceArtifact; a re-export with different bytes (new scan) is a NEW source, related by human review only, never silently merged.
